mapper.sql: user_logs.id AS id, user_logs.public_id::text AS public_key, user_logs.user_id AS user_id, user_logs.created::text AS date_time, user_logs.created::text AS created_at, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), u.username, CONCAT('User#', user_logs.user_id) ) AS user_name, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), u.username, CONCAT('User#', user_logs.user_id) ) AS username, user_logs.type AS action, user_logs.type AS action_name, user_logs.type AS description, user_logs.type AS message, user_logs.remote_addr AS remote_addr, user_logs.http_user_agent AS http_user_agent
FROM user_logs LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = user_logs.user_id
